mapper.select: select id, exam_id, student_id, answer_status, create_time, update_time, deleted from exam_student where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId}
mapper.insert:
insert into exam_student(exam_id, student_id, answer_status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values
(#{item.examId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.answerStatus}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted})
mapper.update: update exam_student set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where exam_id = #{examId} and deleted = 0
